rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core topic (how network structure affects online performance): it studies seller network position/accessibility and commission outcomes in social commerce, while the citing paper models ego-network structure and song-play success over time. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior social-network/online-success work that used more static snapshots, which plausibly includes this 2010 study, so this is not clearly an incidental mention.
